node.text:
🔘Mount Laojun's Temple🔘
⚫Located in Henan Province, China.
⚫It's pavilion with a painted golden roof sits atop one of the peaks of Laojun Mountain.

⚫Laojun Mountain is known for its cultural heritage of Taoism , the mountain owes its name to the famous philosopher Lao Tzu, founder of Taoism and who resided on the mountain as hermit.

⚫Laojun is the highest peak of the Funiu Mountains, with a height of 2217m.

🏯Follow me @ancient.scientist to enjoy more and more posts about our world's marvellous History.❤
